rationale: Both correctly diagnose the issue as invalid/run-level misconfiguration (dummy weights at core_model, extended to online serving by #4354) matching the thread's actual resolution, and both give the correct --run-level=full_model fix. Y is more thoroughly grounded, citing a wider spread of files (run_args.py, test_qwen3_omni.py, runtime.py, stage_config.py, assertions.py) and correctly clarifies that the full_model pytest marker is only a selection filter and doesn't itself set the run-level — a subtlety X's phrasing glosses over. Y is also more complete, covering prerequisites (real weights, video path existing, GPU memory split) and adding a non-contradictory ergonomics suggestion, while X's hardware note is more speculative and less tied to thread evidence.
